XGVec3TransformNormal

Transforms the 3D vector normal by the given matrix.

XGVECTOR3* XGVec3TransformNormal(
  XGVECTOR3* pOut,
  CONST XGVECTOR3* pV,
  CONST XGMATRIX* pM
);

Parameters

pOut
[in, out] Pointer to the XGVECTOR3 structure that is the result of the operation.
pV
[in] Pointer to the source XGVECTOR3 structure.
pM
[in] Pointer to the source XGMATRIX structure.

Return Values

Pointer to a XGVECTOR3 structure that is the transformed vector.

Remarks

This function transforms the vector normal (x, y, z, 0) of the vector, pV, by the matrix, pM.

If you transform a normal by a non-affine matrix, the matrix you pass to this function should be the transpose of the inverse of the matrix you would use to transform a coordinate.

The return value for this function is the same value returned in the pOut parameter. In this way, the XGVec3TransformNormal function can be used as a parameter for another function.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in xgmath.h.
  Import Library: Use xgraphics.lib.
